Author: BlueWaveXIV
Name: AutoList
Description: AutoList turns retainer Market Board chores into supervised AutoList, AutoRefresh, and Consolidate Retainers workflows with a small in-game tray that lights up when your character is ready to start.
Punchline: Turn retainer listing from market-board chore into one-click momentum.
Changelog:
Raised AutoList Max/List for shards, crystals, and clusters to 9,999.
Kept normal stackable items capped at 999.
Updated planning, item defaults, config pruning, and the AutoList Items UI to use the correct item-specific limit.
